name: diff-json
description: Compare two JSON files and show key differences in compact format, replacing inline python3 json.load chains for environment config comparison.

parameters.name: --key
parameters.description: Compare only this dot-separated sub-key (e.g., features, serverData.features)

parameters.name: --no-header
parameters.description: Suppress header lines for machine-readable output

parameters.name: --indent
parameters.description: Pretty-print matching values with N spaces

parameters.name: --show-equal
parameters.description: Also show keys where values are equal

parameters.name: --only-in1
parameters.description: Show keys only present in file1

parameters.name: --only-in2
parameters.description: Show keys only present in file2

examples.expected: Differences (development.json vs test.json) with changed feature flags

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses inline python3 -c 'import json; ...' compare chains into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per config comparison.
